entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for yield prediction under salinity stress

entities.name: ORYZA SATIVA L.
entities.description: The scientific name of the rice plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop

entities.name: SALINITY STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by high salt concentration in soil

entities.name: SOIL ELECTRICAL CONDUCTIVITY
entities.description: A measure used to estimate yield reduction caused by salinity stress

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by lack of available water

entities.name: ION TOXICITY
entities.description: The toxic effect of excessive ion accumulation in plants due to salinity

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL IMBALANCE
entities.description: The disruption of nutrient uptake and balance in plants due to salinity

entities.name: K/NA RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of potassium to sodium concentration in rice leaves used as a predictor for yield

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: The country where the field experiments were conducted

entities.name: AFRICA RICE CENTER
entities.description: The specific experimental farm in Senegal where data were collected

entities.name: REGRESSION ANALYSES
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine the best fitting function for yield prediction

entities.name: F-TEST
entities.description: Statistical test used to determine the best fitting function for yield prediction

entities.name: EXPONENTIAL FUNCTION
entities.description: The mathematical model used to predict relative yield based on the K/Na ratio

entities.name: RELATIVE YIELD
entities.description: The ratio of yield under salinity stress to the potential yield

relationships.description: is the independent variable for predicting
